violations.text: An employee was observed eating in the back storage area next to single service items. Proper procedures reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

The drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025
The floor under both soda station was observed with an accumulation of food debris/spilled liquid. The establishment shall be cleaned as often as necessary. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2024

Scoops in cheese containers are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelves throughout kitchen and beverage station counters have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2023

The ceiling vents in back kitchen area has an accumulation of dust and biofilm. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2023

The floors and walls behind/under equipment throughout kitchen area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2023
